development.SDK_prog_lang_list: C++; Java; JavaScript; Python; Objective-C; Swift; C#; C; Kotlin; Monkey C; Ruby; BitBake; Batchfile; Jsonnet

social.GIT_prog_lang_list: Bash/Shell; C; C#; C++; Java; JavaScript; Kotlin; Objective-C; Python; Ruby; Swift

governance.STORE_lang_list: Indonesian; Malay; Czech; Danish; German; English; Spanish; French; Croatian; Italian; Hungarian; Dutch; Norwegian; Polish; Portuguese; Slovak; Slovenian; Finnish; Swedish; Greek; Russian; Hebrew; Thai; Korean; Japanese; Simplified Chinese; Traditional Chinese

moderators.language_notes: Connect IQ Store supports 28 languages with language switcher

evidence.API_evidence: Golf API documented with GET and POST methods for scorecard data, launch monitor data, and GPS shot data. Connect IQ SDK provides APIs for device apps, data fields, widgets, and watch faces. Garmin Connect Developer Program offers Health API, Activity API, Training API, Courses API, and Women's Health API with OAuth 2.0 authentication.
evidence.SDK_evidence: Connect IQ SDK available with Monkey C programming language, supports multiple device types. FIT SDK available for multiple programming languages (Python, Java, C#, C, JavaScript, C++, Swift, Objective-C). Garmin Health SDKs for Android and iOS. Multiple GitHub repositories with SDKs in various languages.
evidence.AI_evidence: No AI models, agents, or AI-specific features documented in the developer portal content.
evidence.language_evidence: Connect IQ Store shows language switcher with 28 languages. Japanese language support mentioned in Garmin Connect Developer Program FAQ. GitHub repositories and documentation primarily in English.

coding_notes: Platform has comprehensive developer ecosystem with multiple SDKs, APIs, app store with certification process, monetization through Connect IQ store, extensive GitHub presence with 14 programming languages, and strong governance with OAuth-based role management and comprehensive terms of use.

changes.GIT_prog_lang_list: "C++; Java; JavaScript; Python; Objective-C; Swift; C#; C; Kotlin; Monkey C; Ruby; BitBake; Batchfile; Jsonnet" → "Bash/Shell; C; C#; C++; Java; JavaScript; Kotlin; Objective-C; Python; Ruby; Swift"
